title: Roasted Chinese Garlic Noodles
description: A comforting and savory dish featuring roasted garlic and poached noodles, perfect for a sick day.
instructions: Peel and chop the garlic cloves, separating them into individual pieces.
Place the garlic on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast for 15 minutes.
While the garlic is roasting, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the noodles according to package instructions, or until they are slightly undercooked.
Drain the noodles and set them aside, then heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the cooked garlic to the skillet and stir to coat with the oil, then add the broth and stir to combine.
Bring the broth to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly reduced.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and broth mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then garnish with chopped scallions and serve hot.
